title: Token economics: buy pricing, supply, and purchaseTokens
what_to_reason: Correct token minting math and supply updates
Entry/exit fee application and rounding/truncation effects
Use of `magnitude` and profitPerShare scaling with int256 casts
how_to_reason: Trace values for small and large _incomingeth to identify rounding errors
Check casts between uint256 and int256 around payoutsTo_ and profitPerShare_
Consider precision loss from division and whether fees can be drained via rounding
Construct sequences of buys/sells to exercise initial-mint path and repeated mints
edge_cases: Very small transfers leading to zero tokens due to rounding
Huge buys causing overflow of tokenSupply_ (though SafeMath used)
Mismatch between on-chain token units and assumed 1:1 mapping in frontend helpers
